name: Luis Mesias, PhD
headline: Senior Research Engineer building VR, haptics, neurotechnology, and clinical research systems.
subheadline: Developing open-source stimulation software and home-based VR rehabilitation workflows for clinical research.
highlights: Independently implemented a home-based clinical trial workflow spanning IRB, recruitment, intervention delivery, and outcomes analysis.
Delivered Unity-based VR diagnostics and rehabilitation tools for veterans with TBI, integrating eye tracking, IRB-compliant protocols, and clinician-facing workflows.
